query:
-- Get all openings and their puzzle counts
SELECT 
  o.name AS openingName,
  o.eco AS ecoCode,
  o.isLocked,
  COUNT(p.id) AS puzzleCount
FROM openings o
LEFT JOIN puzzles p ON p.openingName = o.name OR p.eco = o.eco
GROUP BY o.id, o.name, o.eco, o.isLocked
ORDER BY o.isLocked ASC, puzzleCount DESC;
